food_categories.name: Edible Oil
food_categories.definition: Oils intended for human consumption, including named oil types and blends.

food_categories.name: Ghee
food_categories.definition: Clarified milk fat and products marketed as ghee.

food_categories.name: Milk
food_categories.definition: Liquid milk and directly equivalent milk products.

food_categories.name: Paneer and Dairy Products
food_categories.definition: Paneer and dairy products other than milk or ghee.

food_categories.name: Grains and Flour
food_categories.definition: Whole grains, milled grain and flour products.

food_categories.name: Honey
food_categories.definition: Honey and products marketed as honey.

food_categories.name: Other Foods
food_categories.definition: Food products not represented by another provisional category.

issue_categories.name: Adulteration
issue_categories.definition: Addition, removal or alteration that changes the represented composition of a food.

issue_categories.name: Substitution
issue_categories.definition: Replacement of an expected ingredient or product with another material.

issue_categories.name: Dilution
issue_categories.definition: Reduction in concentration through addition of a lower-value or neutral material.

issue_categories.name: Contamination
issue_categories.definition: Unintended presence of a harmful or undesirable substance.

issue_categories.name: Misbranding
issue_categories.definition: Labelling or representation that does not accurately describe the product.

issue_categories.name: Substandard Quality
issue_categories.definition: Failure to meet an applicable compositional or quality standard.

issue_categories.name: Unsafe Food
issue_categories.definition: Food assessed or alleged to present a safety risk.

issue_categories.name: Counterfeit or Fake Product
issue_categories.definition: A product represented as an authentic brand or food when it is not.

issue_categories.name: Prohibited Additive
issue_categories.definition: Use of an additive that is prohibited for the product or use case.

issue_categories.name: Residue or Chemical Hazard
issue_categories.definition: Chemical residues or hazards, including pesticides, drugs and heavy metals.

issue_categories.name: Microbial Hazard
issue_categories.definition: Food-safety concerns involving pathogenic or indicator microorganisms.

issue_categories.name: Packaging or Labelling Violation
issue_categories.definition: Non-compliance involving packaging, declarations or labels.

issue_categories.name: Reuse or Improper Processing
issue_categories.definition: Unsafe reuse or processing practices that do not necessarily constitute adulteration.

issue_categories.name: Unclear or Pending Classification
issue_categories.definition: Insufficient validated information to assign another issue category.
